summary: Completed testing of MoltBot CRM - Societe.com API, WhatsApp webhook, Contacts page, and Login. Backend: 13/14 tests passed (93%). Frontend: All pages load correctly.

minor.issue: Returns 403 'Accès réservé aux administrateurs' even with valid admin token - may need role check adjustment
WebSocket connection fails initially with 503, then reconnects successfully

issues: React warning: Each child in a list should have a unique 'key' prop in ContactsPage render method
React warning: Each child in a list should have a unique 'key' prop in DashboardOverview render method

action_items: Optional: Fix React key prop warnings in ContactsPage and DashboardOverview components
Optional: Implement /api/events endpoint or remove frontend calls to it
critical_code_review_comments: Societe.com API integration is working correctly with authentication
WhatsApp webhook is accessible and properly validates incoming requests
PDF generation for quotes via WhatsApp is implemented in generate_and_upload_quote_pdf function
ContactDetailSheet.jsx has Finances tab that displays Societe.com financial data when contact has SIRET

success_rate.frontend: 100% - Login, Dashboard, Contacts pages all load correctly

context_for_next_testing_agent: Societe.com API integration tested and working. WhatsApp webhook accessible. Login and Contacts pages functional. The Finances tab in ContactDetailSheet requires a contact with SIRET to display financial data from Societe.com.

Societe.com API Search Company.notes: Returns company list with SIREN, nom, ville, activite. Requires authentication.

Societe.com API Company Details.notes: Returns company details including dirigeants and bilans. Requires authentication.

WhatsApp Webhook.notes: POST endpoint accessible, validates phone_number field. GET returns 405 as expected.

Login Page.notes: Login form displays correctly, authentication works with provided credentials.

Contacts Page.notes: Displays 121 contacts, list loads correctly after authentication.

Dashboard.notes: Dashboard loads with KPIs, charts, and quick action buttons.

mocked_apis.note: All APIs are real. Societe.com uses API key: 6324e71a28971350a9ea387c82c5ff65
